message:
test(abi): add 81 integration tests for 7 untested ABI modules

New test files covering previously untested modules:
- errno_abi_test.rs (6): thread-local errno storage, thread isolation
- io_abi_test.rs (13): dup/dup2/dup3, pipe/pipe2, close, fcntl
- mmap_abi_test.rs (9): mmap/munmap, mprotect, msync, madvise, mlock, mremap
- poll_abi_test.rs (19): poll/ppoll, select, epoll_create/ctl/wait, eventfd, timerfd, sched_yield
- pwd_abi_test.rs (15): getpwnam/getpwuid/_r, setpwent/getpwent/endpwent, gshadow, lckpwdf
- resource_abi_test.rs (6): getrlimit, setrlimit
- termios_abi_test.rs (13): cfget/cfset speed, tcgetattr/tcsetattr on PTY

All 81 tests pass, clean clippy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
